name: Prawn Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Medium or small fresh prawns
3 tsp Garlic and ginger ground together
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the prawns and rub them with salt and turmeric. Set aside.
2. Heat oil, add sliced onions, and fry until yellow.
3. Add all the other spices (garlic-ginger paste, cumin seeds, chili powder, salt, and turmeric) and fry for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add the prawns to the pan and mix them with the spices.
5. Add either grated coconut, ground coconut, or a little water squeezed out as coconut milk.
- If using coconut milk, add half a cup of hot water.
- If using grated or ground coconut, add 1 cup of hot water.
6. Cover and cook over slow fire until the prawns are tender and a very thick gravy remains.
